seoTitle: Mitsubishi Electric News | Product Updates, Technology Announcements | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Latest news and updates from Mitsubishi Electric including new product releases, technology announcements, and industry insights for power semiconductor solutions.

news.title: Mitsubishi Electric Announces 8th Generation IGBT Technology
news.summary: Mitsubishi Electric unveils 8th generation CSTBT technology with 20% lower losses and improved switching characteristics for next-generation industrial drives.
news.content: Mitsubishi Electric Corporation has announced the development of its 8th generation Carrier Stored Trench-gate Bipolar Transistor (CSTBT) technology, representing a significant advancement in IGBT performance. The new technology achieves approximately 20% lower switching losses compared to the current 7th generation while maintaining the same low on-state voltage drop.

news.title: Mitsubishi Expands SiC MOSFET Portfolio with 1700V Modules
news.summary: New 1700V SiC MOSFET modules target high-voltage applications including traction inverters and medium-voltage drives.
news.content: Mitsubishi Electric has expanded its Silicon Carbide (SiC) MOSFET product line with the introduction of 1700V rated modules. The new BSM170 series addresses growing demand for high-voltage power conversion in electric vehicle traction inverters, renewable energy systems, and industrial medium-voltage drives. The modules feature Mitsubishi's advanced 2nd generation SiC process technology, delivering industry-leading efficiency and reliability.

news.title: Mitsubishi DIPIPM Surpasses 150 Million Units Shipped
news.summary: Landmark achievement underscores DIPIPM's position as the world's leading intelligent power module for home appliance applications.
news.content: Mitsubishi Electric announced that cumulative shipments of its DIPIPM (Dual-In-Line Package Intelligent Power Module) products have exceeded 150 million units since their introduction in 1997. This milestone reinforces DIPIPM's position as the world's most widely used intelligent power module for home appliance motor control applications. The DIPIPM portfolio continues to evolve with new products addressing emerging applications in heat pumps, air purifiers, and smart home appliances.

news.title: Mitsubishi Launches Complete EV Charging Solution Reference Design
news.summary: New reference design accelerates development of high-efficiency DC fast chargers using SiC MOSFET technology.
news.content: Mitsubishi Electric has released a comprehensive reference design for electric vehicle DC fast charging stations. The solution leverages Mitsubishi's SiC MOSFET modules to achieve efficiency levels exceeding 99% while supporting power levels from 50kW to 350kW. The reference design includes complete schematics, PCB layout, control software, and thermal management guidelines, enabling customers to significantly reduce development time for EV charging infrastructure.

news.title: Mitsubishi IPMs Enable Industry 4.0 with Integrated Communication
news.summary: New intelligent power modules feature integrated communication interfaces for predictive maintenance and condition monitoring.
news.content: Mitsubishi Electric has introduced a new generation of intelligent power modules (IPMs) with integrated communication capabilities designed for Industry 4.0 applications. The modules incorporate built-in sensors for temperature, current, and voltage monitoring, with data accessible through standardized communication protocols. This enables real-time condition monitoring, predictive maintenance, and integration with industrial IoT systems, helping manufacturers improve equipment uptime and reduce maintenance costs.
